TELEPHONE CONFERENCE: PRESENT WERE MR. WAYNE LEWIS LESSER, (415)563-2111 FOR PLTF; MR. GARY GANCHROW, (213)683-6500 FOR DEFT. INFORMAL TELEPHONE CONFERENCE HELD IN CHAMBERS REGARDING MR. LESSER'S MAY 28, 2003 LETTER AND THE ATTACHED DISMISSAL ON CASE #416427. THE COURT ADVISED MR. LESSER THAT IF HE WANTED TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IN CASE #416427, HE SHOULD FILE IT. THE COURT WOULD NOT FILE IT FOR HIM AND THAT THE DECISION WAS MR. LESSER'S ENTIRELY. COURT ORDERED THE LETTER TO BE PLACED ON THE COURT FILE AND THE DISMISSAL BE RETURNED TO MR. LESSER. WITH REGARD TO THE MAY 28,2003 TELEPHONE CONFERENCE WITH MR. LESSER AND MR. GANCHROW, COURT AUTHORIZED ADDITIONAL MAILING OF CLASS NOTICE, DEFENSE COUNSEL WAS INSTRUCTED TO PREPARE ORDER. MR. GANCHROW'S MAY 23, 2003 LETTER WAS ALSO ORDERED TO BE PLACED ON THE COURT FILE. BOTH TELEPHONE CONFERENCES WERE NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II/AA; CLERK: C. LI; (503)

THE CLASS CONSISTS OF PURCHASERS WHO PAID A BUYER'S FEE BETWEEN 1/1/00 AND 4/16/00 IN THE CITY OF INDUSTRY, OR BETWEEN 1/1/00 AND 6/23/01 IN BENICIA. CLASS MEMBERS CLAIMING WITHIN A YEAR GET 70% OF BUYER'S FEE PAID IF THEY GO TO AUCTION AGAIN. ATTORNEYS' FEES WERE AWARDED AS FOLLOWS: $5,000.- COSTS WERE ALLOWED. $2,500 TO NAMED PLTFS. $45,000.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN THREE DAYS AFTER RUNNING OF APPEAL TIME, $42,000.00 WITHIN 90 DAYS AFTER RUNNING OF APPEAL TIME, BALANCE IF ANY WILL BE DECIDED BY FILING MOTION AND DECLARATION AFTER ONE YEAR.
